product_overview: Shoes Store is a Flutter-based e-commerce app for buying shoes that supports browsing products with variants, cart/checkout, manual payment confirmation, order tracking, favorites, and a chatbot assistant. The app supports persistent login and basic offline product caching for read-only browsing.
core_goals: Browse and discover shoe products with variants (color, size/SKU)
Search and filter product listings to find desired items quickly
Add products to a cart, update quantities, and complete checkout with a shipping address
Upload payment proof and track order status through the lifecycle (UNPAID → VERIFYING → PAID → SHIPPED → COMPLETED)
Save and manage favorite products for quick access
Manage user profile and addresses and logout to end a session
Ask the built-in chatbot questions about the store or orders

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register a new account, sign in, and persist a session so returning users are routed directly to the Home screen.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in username or email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Arrive at /home
Navigate to /register -> Fill in username, email, and password -> Submit registration form -> Arrive at /login
Navigate to /login -> Submit login form with empty or invalid fields -> See client-side validation errors

features.name: Home Screen
features.description: Main browsing surface showing product grid, promo slider, category filtering, search, and an offline fallback when cached data is used.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> View product grid and promo slider -> Type a query in the search bar to filter products in real time -> Select a category filter to narrow results -> Pull to refresh to reload products
Navigate to /home -> Tap a product card -> Arrive at /detail

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Show full product information, allow selection of color and size/SKU, toggle favorite state, and add the selected variant to the cart.
user_flows: Navigate to /detail -> Select a product color -> Select a product size/SKU -> Toggle favorite state for the product -> Add the selected item to cart -> Navigate to /cart and see the item listed
Navigate to /detail -> Attempt to add item to cart without selecting a required SKU/size -> See validation error prompting SKU/size selection

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Let users view cart contents, update quantities, remove items, and proceed to checkout with shipping details.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> Update an item quantity using increase or decrease controls -> Remove an item from the cart -> Proceed to checkout -> Arrive at /checkout
Navigate to /checkout -> Fill in shipping address and phone number -> Submit checkout form to create order -> Navigate to /orders and see the new order listed

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Display the user's orders with status badges and allow viewing order details and uploading payment proof images to confirm payment.
user_flows: Navigate to /orders -> Open an order to view details -> Arrive at /order-detail -> Upload payment proof image -> See confirmation that the payment proof was submitted (order moves to VERIFYING)

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Provide a listing of products the user has favorited and let users remove favorites or open product details from the list.
user_flows: Navigate to /favorites -> View favorite product grid -> Toggle favorite on an item to remove it from favorites -> Tap a product to open its detail and arrive at /detail

features.name: Chatbot
features.description: A conversational assistant to help users ask questions about products, orders, and the store.
user_flows: Navigate to /chatbot -> Type a message -> Send the message to the assistant -> See the assistant reply in the chat thread

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Enable the user to view and edit profile information, manage addresses, upload a profile photo, and logout to clear session state.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Open edit profile -> Update email, password, or upload a new profile photo -> Submit profile changes -> Return to /profile
Navigate to /profile -> Open add address -> Fill in new address details -> Submit address form -> See the new address listed in /profile
Navigate to /profile -> Choose logout -> Arrive at /login

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: Primary app navigation with five tabs (Home, Orders, ChatBot, Cart, Profile) for quickly switching between main app sections.
user_flows: Navigate to /navbar -> Switch to Home tab -> Arrive at /home -> Switch to Orders tab -> Arrive at /orders -> Switch to Cart tab -> Arrive at /cart -> Switch to Profile tab -> Arrive at /profile

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login dan registrasi user. Cek token saat startup untuk routing otomatis ke Home atau Login.

pages.description: Form login dengan username/email dan password, validasi client-side, redirect ke Home setelah berhasil

interactions.description: Klik tombol Login mengisi form username dan password
Klik link "Daftar" untuk pindah ke RegisterScreen

pages.description: Form registrasi user baru dengan username, email, dan password

interactions.description: Klik tombol Daftar mengisi form registrasi
Klik link "Masuk" untuk kembali ke LoginScreen

features.name: Home Screen
features.description: Halaman utama yang menampilkan produk, promo slider, kategori filter, dan search bar

pages.description: Grid produk dengan filter kategori, search, promo banner slider, dan offline mode fallback

interactions.description: Ketik di search bar untuk filter produk secara real-time
Klik icon filter untuk pilih kategori dari bottom sheet
Klik produk card untuk masuk ke DetailScreen
Klik icon favorit di header untuk ke FavoriteScreen
Pull down untuk reload daftar produk dari API

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Halaman detail produk dengan pilihan warna, ukuran/SKU, deskripsi, review, dan tombol tambah ke keranjang

pages.description: Detail produk lengkap dengan pilihan SKU, tombol favorit, dan add to cart

interactions.description: Pilih warna produk
Pilih ukuran/SKU produk
Toggle favorit produk
Klik "Tambah ke Keranjang" menambahkan item ke cart
Klik tombol back untuk kembali ke HomeScreen

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Halaman keranjang belanja untuk melihat, update quantity, dan hapus item sebelum checkout

pages.description: Daftar item di keranjang dengan opsi ubah quantity dan hapus item

interactions.description: Klik + atau - untuk ubah quantity item
Swipe atau klik hapus untuk remove item dari keranjang
Klik "Checkout" untuk lanjut ke halaman checkout

pages.description: Form pengisian alamat dan telepon sebelum konfirmasi order

interactions.description: Isi alamat pengiriman dan nomor telepon, lalu konfirmasi order

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Riwayat pesanan dan detail pesanan termasuk upload bukti pembayaran

pages.description: List semua pesanan user dengan status badge (UNPAID, VERIFYING, PAID, SHIPPED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED)

interactions.description: Klik order untuk lihat detail

pages.description: Detail order termasuk item, total, status, dan upload bukti pembayaran

interactions.description: Klik upload bukti bayar untuk ambil gambar dan kirim ke server
Klik back ke daftar pesanan

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Daftar produk yang di-favoritkan oleh user

pages.description: Grid produk favorit user dengan opsi hapus favorit

interactions.description: Klik produk untuk ke detail
Klik icon favorit untuk toggle (hapus dari favorit)

features.name: Chatbot
features.description: Asisten chatbot berbasis AI (Gemini) untuk membantu pertanyaan terkait toko

pages.description: Interface chat dengan bot, tampilan balon pesan user dan bot

interactions.description: Ketik pesan dan klik send untuk chat dengan bot

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Profil user termasuk edit email, password, foto profil, dan manajemen alamat

pages.description: Tampilan profil user, daftar alamat, dan tombol logout

interactions.description: Klik Edit Profil untuk ke halaman edit profil
Klik Tambah Alamat untuk ke form tambah alamat
Klik Logout untuk keluar dan kembali ke LoginScreen

pages.description: Form edit email, password, dan upload foto profil

interactions.description: Simpan perubahan profil (email, password, foto)
Upload foto profil baru
Simpan alamat baru

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: Navigasi utama aplikasi dengan 5 tab - Beranda, Pesanan, ChatBot, Keranjang, Profil

pages.description: Tab bar navigasi utama dengan 5 item

interactions.description: Klik tab untuk pindah antar screen utama

known_limitations.issue: Flutter web dalam dev mode (flutter run -d web-server) bukan production build
known_limitations.impact: Performa lebih lambat, beberapa widget animasi mungkin tidak optimal di web

known_limitations.issue: Gambar produk bergantung pada URL dari backend; jika backend offline, gambar tidak tampil
known_limitations.impact: Tampilan produk blank jika backend tidak dapat diakses

known_limitations.issue: Tidak ada validasi format nomor telepon di form checkout
known_limitations.impact: User bisa memasukkan nomor telepon tidak valid
